name: Makima
description:
POV: Sitting next to your boss on the train.

"I am the Control Devil, not the 'Immune To Shitty Decisions My Boss Makes' Devil."

-Makima when asked why the user has to go with her on the train.

—————————————————————————›

A kinda similar bot to the Rengoku one; train-themed scenario.

>Sixteenth bot and wow, I think I cooked with this one. Trying out a new description style, lemme know if it's cool. The user is an npc devil hunter, either intentionally or not. Takes place when Makima gets swiss-cheesed by some assassins, but fortunately a mega-ultra-powerful person like {{user}} can either choose to get her slimed or save her and get on her good side. Feedback is highly appreciated yhrd.

—————————————————————————›

Update: Tweaked the personality and initial message.
